items.text:
I feel light-headed, and light-hearted.
Might I learn to hold glass to the sun
til that light is focused, actinic and burning?

My course was right already.
What merchant casts so wide a net?
My trade carries light
to many thousands,
leaving each the brighter.

I could find peace
in these isles, and beyond.

Have you ever met a seeker
who shone with real success?
Or are they coaxing you away
from the warmth already yours?
